allow: Bash(node -e "const crypto = require\(''crypto''\); console.log\(''JWT_SECRET='' + crypto.randomBytes\(64\).toString\(''hex''\)\); console.log\(''REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET='' + crypto.randomBytes\(64\).toString\(''hex''\)\); console.log\(''ENCRYPTION_KEY='' + crypto.randomBytes\(32\).toString\(''hex''\)\); console.log\(''ENCRYPTION_SALT='' + crypto.randomBytes\(16\).toString\(''hex''\)\);")
